profile_summary: Solo traveler (mid budget) prioritizing business & wifi, quietness, value for money.

recommendations.justification: The Boulevard Verde, Lisbon ranks #1 for this traveler on business & wifi (+0.89), value for money (+0.83), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips."

supporting_evidence.quote: The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips.
Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate.
Great setup for business travel: fast reliable internet and a proper desk.

recommendations.justification: Hotel Vista, Mumbai ranks #2 for this traveler on business & wifi (+0.73), quietness (+0.79), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect."

supporting_evidence.quote: Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect.
Slept beautifully — very quiet despite being central.
The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips.

recommendations.justification: The Royal Lumiere, Istanbul ranks #3 for this traveler on business & wifi (+0.81), value for money (+0.77), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Meeting rooms were well-equipped and the WiFi was rock solid for video calls."

supporting_evidence.quote: Meeting rooms were well-equipped and the WiFi was rock solid for video calls.
Great setup for business travel: fast reliable internet and a proper desk.
Great bang for your buck; you really get a lot for what you pay.
